scope: ADR-0019 governed, test-only procedure-asymmetry adversarial fixture proposal

checks.name: package_structure
checks.evidence: Required proposal layout present: inputs/cases, inputs/controlled_cards, inputs/governance, expected_outcomes, manifest, ledger, rejected ideas, and apply manifest.

checks.name: manifest_integrity
checks.evidence: 14/14 listed non-manifest assets matched raw-byte SHA-256 and byte count. All declared aggregate hashes matched, including inputs when governance is included.

checks.name: typed_schema_validation
checks.evidence: 4/4 controlled cards validated as HistoricalIncidentCard; 3/3 selection_intake objects validated as RepresentativeSelectionIntake.

checks.name: selector_oracle_compatibility
checks.evidence: All 3 cases returned single_representative INC-014 under a reconstructed PR #18 strict-dominance selector. This is compatibility evidence only, not a Tranche 02 run.

checks.name: procedure_neutral_control
checks.evidence: PAV-001 and PAV-002 preserve card identifiers, selection signatures, and all non-procedure card fields; the set-to-set differences are procedure-list fields only.

checks.name: proposal_isolation
checks.evidence: The ledger and governance registry mark the controlled cards test-only and prohibit active-policy, retrieval, selector-calibration, E1, and production load paths. This review can verify structure and stated containment, not independently prove non-use outside the supplied package.

checks.name: source_derivation_registry_exactness
checks.evidence: PAV-001-procedure-asymmetric/INC-013 is derived from source INC-009. Actual changed fields are incident_id, title, and unsafe_procedure_ids. Governance declares only incident_id and title, omitting unsafe_procedure_ids.

case_disposition.reason: Primary adversarial property is diagnostic and its oracle matches the current strict-dominance contract; controlled-card provenance is not yet exact.
Valid order-reversal partner; shares the primary card set and inherits its provenance blocker.
Valid procedure-neutral control; shares the primary source lineage and package manifest.

blocking_finding.why_it_blocks: The fixture exists specifically to test procedure-metadata leakage. Any changed procedure field must be declared precisely in the governed provenance registry. An undeclared procedure mutation makes the adversarial axis non-auditable.

required: Reissue a new proposal archive; do not edit this reviewed archive in place.
Add unsafe_procedure_ids to PAV-001-procedure-asymmetric / INC-013 field_level_perturbations_from_source.
Add a concise ledger/governance purpose explaining that source RB-002 is removed only to isolate the intended RB-003 procedure-availability asymmetry.
Recompute every affected raw-file hash, byte count, group aggregate hash, and proposal manifest hash.
Provide a deterministic derivation assertion that actual changed fields equal declared perturbation fields for every controlled card.

non_claims: No Tranche 02 fixture is accepted, frozen, imported, or evaluated.
No active policy, procedure eligibility, retrieval, retained precedent, missing-fact, or decision-state behavior is changed or validated.
The reconstructed selector compatibility check is not a formal Tranche 02 report.
